#  User Guide Procore Connect For Drawings 
Table of Contents 
##  Publish Drawings to your Upstream Project 
When projects are connected, any published drawings in your upstream project are automatically copied to the downstream project. Just follow the standard steps in your project to:
  1. [Upload Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/upload-drawings)
  2. [Review and Confirm Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/review-and-confirm-drawings)
  3. [Publish Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/publish-drawings)


[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-procore-connect-for-drawings/approve-or-reject-connections-if-review-is-required/)
[ Initiate a Project Connection ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-procore-connect-for-drawings/initiate-a-project-connection/)
